hero.title: Frontend Developer specializing in AI applications and real-time systems

ocr_section.title: Intelligent invoice data extraction with AI
ocr_section.subtitle: PDF document processing, structured parsing with LLM, data normalization and UI for testing with external API keys.
ocr_section.upload_desc: Drag & drop PDF with embedded document preview before processing.
ocr_section.prompt_desc: User selects which columns to extract. The Gemini prompt is generated in real time based on the selection.
ocr_section.parsing_desc: LLM response parsed to JSON, validated and rendered in an editable table.
ocr_section.edit_desc: Editable cells in the results table. CSV export with selected columns.
ocr_section.arch_frontend: React + Vite + Tailwind. Local state with hooks. Decoupled components (services, hooks, pages).
ocr_section.arch_ai: Direct browser call to Gemini 2.5 Flash via REST. User API key in localStorage. Zero backend.
ocr_section.arch_testing: Vitest for business logic. Playwright for E2E flows.

demos.title: Every demo is functional, not a mockup
demos.chat_desc: Connected to Gemini. 3 agents with distinct system prompts (assistant, sales, support). Real responses with per-agent history.
demos.pipeline_desc: CSV dataset with real errors. Validates, transforms, generates report. CSV export.
demos.api_desc: In-memory CRUD with Zustand. Roles, 403, rate limiting.
demos.dashboard_desc: KPIs and charts recalculated in real time with filters.
demos.kanban_desc: Desktop drag-and-drop + mobile tap-to-move. Zustand + localStorage persist.
demos.mcp_desc: Model Context Protocol simulator. Visualize the full flow: tool definitions, tool_call (JSON-RPC), execution and response.

stack.title: Not just logos — tools I use and why

about.title: Problem solving with code
about.p1: Hands-on experience integrating systems via APIs, ETL flows with n8n, reporting with PowerBI and full-stack development with React, Node.js and Python.
about.p2: Previous career managing teams in high-end hospitality (Melia ME Madrid, Mandarin Oriental Barcelona, Livvo Lumm Las Palmas) — organization, working under pressure and fast adaptation.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Available for frontend / full-stack development opportunities.
contact.email_body:
Hi Matías,

I've seen your portfolio and would like to schedule an interview to discuss an opportunity on our team.

When would you be available?

Best regards.

cookie.message: This site uses analytics cookies (Google Analytics) to improve the experience.

ocr_page.title: Invoice OCR Extractor
ocr_page.subtitle: Upload a PDF, choose columns and extract data with Gemini 2.5 Flash
ocr_page.security_desc: Stored only in your browser. The API call goes directly to Google, no intermediary server. Verify in DevTools (F12 > Network).
ocr_page.guide_toggle_has_key: How to get / delete your API key
ocr_page.guide_toggle_no_key: How to get your free API key (2 min)
ocr_page.guide_title: Get a free Gemini API key
ocr_page.guide_step1: Go to Google AI Studio and sign in.
ocr_page.guide_step2: Click "Create API Key" and select a project.
ocr_page.guide_step3: Copy the key (AIza...) and paste it below.
ocr_page.guide_step4: Upload a PDF and extract the data.
ocr_page.guide_cleanup_desc: Click the trash icon to remove it from your browser, and revoke it from Google AI Studio.
ocr_page.guide_free_note: Gemini 2.5 Flash is 100% free within the free tier.
ocr_page.drop_text: Drag an invoice PDF or click to select
ocr_page.columns_hint: Select the fields you need from the invoice

chat_page.title: Multi-Agent AI Chat
chat_page.subtitle: Real chat with Gemini 2.5 Flash. Each agent has a distinct system prompt.
chat_page.need_key: You need a Gemini API key.
chat_page.start_chat: Write a message to talk with

pipeline_page.title: CRM Data Pipeline
pipeline_page.subtitle: Real ETL: extraction, validation, transformation, loading and reporting. Logic in services/, tested with Vitest.
pipeline_page.run_to_see: Run the pipeline to see data

api_page.title: REST API with RBAC
api_page.subtitle: Real CRUD with Zustand store. Change role, create products, test permissions.

dashboard_page.title: Sales Dashboard
dashboard_page.subtitle: Change filters and watch all KPIs and charts recalculate in real time

kanban_page.title: Kanban Task Manager
kanban_page.tap_instruction: Tap the target column to move

mcp_page.title: MCP Server Simulator
mcp_page.subtitle: Interactive Model Context Protocol (MCP) simulator. Visualize the full flow: tool definitions, routing, JSON-RPC tool_call, execution and response.
mcp_page.empty: Type a message to see the full MCP flow
mcp_page.input_placeholder: E.g.: Weather in Barcelona, Search monitor, Calculate 10 x 5...
